video_buffered_play_time_sample.COMMENT: A sample of the current video playtime and the current amount of video in the buffer.

video_buffering_event.COMMENT: Models periods of video playback freezing, for buffering.

video_off_screen_event.COMMENT: Models periods during which the video playback is going off-screen (i.e., the user activates a different browser tab or minimizes the browser window.

video_pause_event.COMMENT: Models periods during which the video playback is being paused by the user.

video_playback_quality_sample.COMMENT: A sample of the playback quality (in terms of video frames/sec, dropped, corrupted frames, etc). Rows of this table contain samples of HTML5 video (see https://developer.mozilla.org/en/docs/Web/API/HTMLVideoElement) and VideoPlaybackQuality (See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/VideoPlaybackQuality) properties.

video_player_size.COMMENT: Models player size change events during a video session.

video_resolution.COMMENT: Models resolution change events during a video session.

video_seek_event.COMMENT: Models events of user navigating to a specific timepoint of playback through the seekbar.

video_session.COMMENT: Models a streaming video (e.g., YouTube) playback session.
